g.text: eBPF Tracer Architecture & Terminal UI Flow

ol.li: Correlation: hash_map keys by Thread ID to calculate latency between Entry/Exit probes.
Aggregation: percpu_array prevents lock contention in kernel; userspace sums totals.
Lifecycle: libbpf handles btf relocations and elf loading.
Performance: Ring buffer prevents dropped events compared to old perf buffer.
